MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON CERTAIN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES RAISED BY DEFENDANT BROCK AGUIRRE (TRANSACTION ID # 100123327) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOE, JANE , AN INDIVIDUAL HEARING SET FOR MAY-03-2021 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON CERTAIN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES RAISED BY DEFENDANT BROCK AGUIRRE. MATTER CALLED. ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS, THE COURT STATES THAT IT IS INCLINED TO TREAT THE MOTION BEFORE IT TODAY AS A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AS TO THE VALIDITY OF THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. NO OBJECTION BY EITHER COUNSEL. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MR. SMITH IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER WHICH REFLECTS THE COURT'S RULING SET FORTH IN OPEN COURT THIS MORNING. THE ORDER IS TO BE CIRCULATED TO MR. TAIBI IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 AND THEN SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Aguirre To Attend And Testify At A Deposition And Pay Sanctions In The Amount Of $812.05
Off Calendar Jul-23-2021 Advanced From Aug-16-21 To Aug-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Aguirre To Attend And Testify At A Deposition And Pay Sanctions In The Amount Of $812.05
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JASON K. SMITH, Esq. of MK Smith, APC (Tel: 949-299-2500) for plaintiff Jane Doe;
Atty. AARON AQUINO, Esq. specially appearing for attorney Michael A. Taibi of Taibi & Associates (Tel: 619-218-6096) for defendant Brock Aguirre.

FURTHER HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JANE DOE's Motion To Compel Defendant Aguirre To Attend And Testify At A Deposition And Pay Sanctions In The Amount Of $812.05.

The parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem at the prior hearing on this matter.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion to compel attendance at deposition is granted. The deposition is to take place on or before August 17, 2021. The parties are to agree on the specific date for the deposition by the close of business on August 12, 2021. The Court grants the request for sanctions in the amount of $812.05.

The prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order, submit the proposed order to opposing counsel for review by the close of business today, and then email the proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem at williamclynn@gmail.com by the close of business on August 11, 2021.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Aguirre To Attend And Testify At A Deposition And Pay Sanctions In The Amount Of $812.05
Off Calendar Aug-05-2021 Continued To Aug-10-21 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JASON K. SMITH, Esq. of MK Smith, APC (Tel: 949-299-2500) for plaintiff Jane Doe;
Atty. AARON AQUINO, Esq. specially appearing for attorney Michael A. Taibi of Taibi & Associates (Tel: 619-218-6096) for defendant Brock Aguirre.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JANE DOE's Motion To Compel Defendant Aguirre To Attend And Testify At A Deposition And Pay Sanctions In The Amount Of $812.05.

Matter called.

Attorney Mr. Smith present for the plaintiff. No other counsel present at this time.

Plaintiff's counsel stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem, and authorizes the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on his behalf.

The Court indicates that the parties did not comply with the court's requirement regarding the lodging of courtesy copies. The Court instructs plaintiff's counsel to email electronic copies of plaintiff's motion papers to the Judge Pro Tem at williamclynn@gmail.com (cc'ing Discovery302@sftc.org).

The Court continues the matter The Court continues this matter to August 10, 2021 at 1:30 p.m. on the Discovery Calendar to hear oral argument from counsel. The Court instructs plaintiff's counsel to provide notice to the defendant of the continued hearing date and time.

Matter re-called.

Attorney Mr. Aquino appears late for the defendant. No other counsel present at this time.

Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem, and authorizes the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on his behalf.

The Court informs defense counsel of the continued hearing date and time and the requirement that defendant email electronic copies of defendant's opposition papers to the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION On Certain Affirmative Defenses Raised By Defendant Brock Aguirre
Off Calendar May-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Jason Smith, Esq. of MK Smith A.P.C, 949,299.2500, for Plaintiff;
Atty. Michael Taibi, Esq. of Taibi and Associates,619.354.1798, for Defendant.

PLAINTIFF JANE DOE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION On Certain Affirmative Defenses Raised By Defendant Brock Aguirre.

Matter called. ARGUMENT/DISCUSSIONS are held. At the conclusion of argument/discussions, the Court states that it is inclined to treat the motion before it today as a motion for judgment on the pleadings as to the validity of the affirmative defenses. No objection by either counsel. The Court vacates its tentative ruling.

Mr. Smith is to prepare a form of order which reflects the court's ruling set forth in open court this morning. The order is to be circulated to Mr. Taibi in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and then submitted to the Court for review and signature.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)
